page.title: Investments
page.subtitle: Track your investment portfolio
page.autoGeneratedSymbolNote: * Auto-generated symbol name. Could not find in Yahoo dataset.

portfolioSummary.title: Portfolio Summary
portfolioSummary.holdingsValueTooltip: The current market value of all securities you hold, based on the latest available prices.
portfolioSummary.cashBalanceTooltip: Uninvested cash sitting in your investment accounts, available for purchasing securities.
portfolioSummary.totalGainTooltip: The total profit or loss across all your investments: Portfolio Value minus Net Invested. Includes realized gains, unrealized gains, dividends, and interest.
portfolioSummary.netInvestedTooltip: The net amount of your own money deposited into your investment accounts. This is total contributions minus withdrawals, excluding any investment gains, dividends, or interest earned.
portfolioSummary.costBasisTooltip: The total amount you originally paid to acquire your investments, including purchase prices and transaction fees. Used to calculate your gains and losses.
portfolioSummary.gainLossTooltip: Unrealized gain or loss on your current holdings: Market Value minus Cost Basis. Does not include realized gains from past sales or income received.
portfolioSummary.simpleReturnTooltip: Total percentage gain or loss on your holdings, calculated as (Market Value − Cost Basis) ÷ Cost Basis. Does not account for the timing of contributions or withdrawals.
portfolioSummary.twrTooltip: Measures how well your investments performed regardless of when you added or removed money. Eliminates the impact of cash flow timing to show pure investment performance.
portfolioSummary.cagrTooltip: Compound Annual Growth Rate. Your annualized return based on Net Invested vs. current portfolio value, as if growth had been perfectly steady each year.

groupedHoldings.title: Holdings by Account
groupedHoldings.cashClickTitle: Click to view cash account transactions
groupedHoldings.symbolClickTitle: Click to filter transactions by this symbol

investmentValueChart.title: Portfolio Value Over Time
investmentValueChart.intradayUnavailableTitle: Intraday view unavailable for this account mix
investmentValueChart.intradayUnavailableDescription: One or more holdings use a quote provider (MSN Money) that does not expose intraday data. Switch to a longer range to see daily snapshots.
investmentValueChart.noDataForPeriod: No investment data for this period.

transactionList.title: Recent Transactions
transactionList.deleteConfirmMessage: Are you sure you want to delete this {action} transaction{security}?
transactionList.deleteConfirmGeneric: Are you sure you want to delete this transaction?

transactionForm.noSecuritiesHeld: No securities held in this account
transactionForm.noSplitRatioWarning: No split ratio is set on this transaction. Enter the ratio as it was announced before saving — Monize won't assume one for you.
transactionForm.splitRatioHelp: Enter the ratio as it was announced. For a 2-for-1 split use 2 new and 1 old; for a 1-for-2 reverse split use 1 new and 2 old. Effective ratio:
transactionForm.newPriceAfterSplit: New price per share, after split ({currency}, optional)
transactionForm.holdingPreviewCostBasisNote: Total cost basis is preserved across the split.
transactionForm.noSharesOnDate: No shares of this security were held in this account on {date}; the split will be recorded but won't change holdings until shares are added on or before that date.
transactionForm.transferCostNote: The cost per share (prefilled from the source account) is carried to the destination so your gain and profit reports stay correct. This moves shares only -- no cash changes hands.
transactionForm.conversionHelp: Adjust the rate or the converted total to match the amount actually posted to your cash account.
transactionForm.toastSameAccount: Source and destination accounts must be different
transactionForm.toastQuantityRequired: Quantity must be greater than zero
transactionForm.toastSplitRatioRequired: Split ratio must be greater than zero
transactionForm.toastPairedLegError: Could not load the paired transfer leg; reopen and try again
